rules.title: Network IOC Detection [ae046c0ec765]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [ae046c0ec765]
id: cdb-net-ae046c0ec765
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 1 malicious IPs and 3 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-06-15
modified: 2026-06-15
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '5.5.13.0'
        DestinationHostname|contains:
            - 'kodak.com'
            - 'metacpan.org'
            - 'theorangeblowfish.com'
    condition: selection
level: medium
falsepositives:
    - Shared hosting infrastructure
    - CDN/cloud provider IP overlap
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://cyberdudebivash.com/threat-intel
source_advisories: CVE-2026-12205: Crypt::DSA versions before 1.21 for Perl reused the nonce across signatures, leading to private-key recovery
CVE-2026-6517: Mattermost Desktop App versions <=6.1 5.5.13.0 fail to restrict the allow list of domains to which NTLM credentials were

rules.title: Network Intel YARA [ae046c0ec765]
rules.content:
rule CDB_SENTINEL_Network_Intel_ae046c0ec765
{
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51"
        description = "Detects network IOCs from threat intelligence feeds"
        date = "2026-06-15"
        severity = "high"
        reference = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        batch_id = "ae046c0ec765"
        ioc_count = 4

    strings:
        $ip_0 = "5.5.13.0" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_1 = "kodak.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_2 = "metacpan.org" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_3 = "theorangeblowfish.com" ascii wide nocase

    condition:
        filesize < 100MB and any of them
}
source_advisories: CVE-2026-12205: Crypt::DSA versions before 1.21 for Perl reused the nonce across signatures, leading to private-key recovery
CVE-2026-6517: Mattermost Desktop App versions <=6.1 5.5.13.0 fail to restrict the allow list of domains to which NTLM credentials were

# Batch: ae046c0ec765 | Generated: 2026-06-15
# IOC Count: 20
# Source: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com

alert ip any any -> 5.5.13.0 any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel IP: 5.5.13.0"; sid:9749538; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel Domain: kodak.com"; dns.query; content:"kodak.com"; nocase; sid:9750538; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel Domain: metacpan.org"; dns.query; content:"metacpan.org"; nocase; sid:9750539; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel Domain: theorangeblowfish.com"; dns.query; content:"theorangeblowfish.com"; nocase; sid:9750540; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert http any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel URL"; http.uri; content:"dist/Crypt-DSA"; nocase; sid:9751538; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert http any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel URL"; http.uri; content:"perl-Crypt-OpenPGP/Crypt-DSA"; nocase; sid:9751539; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
